heading: Lease authority
label: 576b Lease authority
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary may lease space available in buildings for which funding for construction or purchase was provided from the revolving fund established by the 1st section of the Civil Functions Appropriations Act, 1954 (; ), under such terms and conditions as are acceptable to the Secretary. The proceeds from such leases shall be credited to the revolving fund for the purposes set forth in such Act.33 U.S.C. 57667 Stat. 199
notes: References in TextThe Civil Functions Appropriations Act, 1954, referred to in text, is , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act July 27, 1953, ch. 24567 Stat. 197
